text: Onboarded Carmen and Mary to Slack. Use #event-planning for active events, #vendors for supplier stuff, #client-updates for anything client-facing. Keep it here so things don't get buried in text threads.
Got it. Will drop shoot notes here instead of texting.

Starting the Rodriguez Quinceañera file. Event date Oct 17, 2026. Venue: Emerald Hall, 4500 W Flamingo. Walkthrough booked Oct 3. Carmen — you're on photo. Mary — choreography for waltz + surprise dance. Let's nail down contracts before end of month.
Confirmed for Oct 17. Need shot list from the family by Sep 1 at the latest. Anything unusual about the venue layout I should know before the walkthrough?
On board for choreography. Is the surprise dance confirmed with the chambelanes yet or still TBD on their end?
Mary — chambelanes are confirmed, 8 guys. Mom wants the surprise dance to be a cumbia medley into the waltz. Can you do a first rehearsal in Dec? They're high schoolers so weekends only.
Dec works. I'll plan 4 Saturday sessions — Dec 6, 13, 20, then pick back up in Jan after break. Send me contact for the lead chambelan so I can coordinate directly.
Reaching out to three florists for Rodriguez. Need centerpieces for 20 tables, rose and lily mix in blush and gold. Quotes due back by Nov 15. If anyone has a referral, drop it here.
I worked with Desert Bloom Florals on the Garza event — good quality, reasonable. Contact is Luisa, 702-256-0318. Tell her Carmen sent you.

Rodriguez family update: deposit paid in full ($1,200). Guest count locked at 160. Mom confirmed blush/gold color scheme. They want a slideshow — 80 photos from birth to present. Carmen, flagging now so you can factor that into the day-of schedule.
Noted. I'll build in 20 min during dinner service for slideshow so I'm not competing with it for attention. Can you get me the photos by Aug 1 so I have time to edit?

Adding Fuentes Quinceañera to the board. Camila Fuentes, Nov 14, 2026. Venue: Las Palmas Banquet Hall, 8380 W Sahara. Smaller event — 90 guests. Contract signed. Carmen and Mary, are you both available that date?
Nov 14 is open. I'll mark it.
Available. Smaller court?
Mary — Fuentes has 7 chambelanes, 7 damas. Standard waltz, no surprise dance. Family is open to your choreography suggestions. Budget is tighter so keep it to 3 rehearsal sessions.
DJ for Rodriguez: got a quote from DJ Tomas Ruiz — $950 for 5 hours. He's done two of our events before, no complaints. Going to book him unless someone has an objection.
Tomas is solid. He adjusts the music energy on the fly which helps me time shots during the reception. Go for it.
Heads up: I'll be at the hotel Dec 22–26 covering holiday shifts. Response times will be slow. Anything urgent before then, flag it this week.

First Rodriguez rehearsal done — Dec 6. Chambelanes picked up the cumbia steps faster than I expected. Three of them have done this before. Waltz needs more work. Scheduling a mid-Jan touch-up after the holiday break.
Good to hear. Make sure Mariana runs the waltz with them — she tends to drift left on the turns.

Rodriguez Jan check-in: venue deposit paid, florist booked (Desert Bloom), DJ confirmed. Still open: cake vendor, limo for Mariana, court outfit fittings. Mom has 9 months — reminded her not to wait on the fittings.

Looking for a bakery that does tiered Quinceañera cakes in Las Vegas. Need minimum 3 tiers, fondant work, matches blush/gold theme. Anyone have a contact? Don't want to cold call — last time that took forever.
Try Sweet Layers on Decatur. Owner is Marisol. She did the Torres cake in November — looked great, tasted better. Number is 702-256-0427.
Building the Rodriguez day-of timeline. Ceremony 5 PM, reception 6 PM. Carmen — I'm slotting formal portraits from 3:30 to 4:45. Does that work or do you need more time?
75 minutes is tight if the court is 15 people. I need 90 min minimum. Can we push portraits to 3:15 and tell the family 3:00 so they actually show up on time?

Updated Rodriguez timeline: family call time 3:00 PM, portraits 3:15–4:45, ceremony 5:00 PM, reception 6:00 PM. Will share final PDF with the family and all vendors next week. Mary — final dress rehearsal targeting late Sep, date TBD once school schedules clear.

Q1 recap: Rodriguez and Fuentes both on track. Two new inquiries came in this month — following up next week. Reminder to log any vendor contacts you use in #vendors so we're not starting from scratch every event.
Rodriguez event is locked for Oct 17. Ceremony 5 PM sharp at Emerald Hall.
Got it. I'll be there for load-in two hours before guests.
Court rehearsal is set for the 10th, five couples.
Perfect. Waltz first, then the surprise dance after dinner.
DJ Ruben confirmed. Need his deposit invoice this week.
Florist quote came in high, negotiating the centerpiece count.
Rental company has the tall vases in stock, reserving 12.
Sent the Rodriguez family the updated timeline for approval.
Fuentes deposit received, contract countersigned.
Cookie orders open. Tracking gift-box counts here through Dec 15.
Two boxes for the Alvarez family, paid through QuickPay.
Reminder: keep event chatter in the right channel so nothing gets buried.
